---
title: "Research"
toc: false
---

## Adaptive Learning and Efficient Model Optimization

Efficient adaptation and optimization when feedback is limited, noisy,
delayed, or expensive to obtain.

## Distributed Intelligence and Multi-Agent Systems

Distributed optimization, consensus, and graph-based coordination when
no single agent observes the global objective.

## Networked Control and Multi-Robot Autonomy

Coordination and control of cyber-physical systems and robotic teams under
uncertainty and nonstationarity.

### Cross-cutting themes

communication constraints · noisy measurements · delayed feedback ·
nonstationarity · graph-structured interaction
